Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts

Class BirthStatistics

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.BirthStatistics
public class BirthStatistics extends Object
BirthStatistics determines when a mother will give birth, the sex of the baby, and the newborn height and weight.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    BIRTH_DATE
    The date of birth during pregnancy.
    static final String
    BIRTH_HEIGHT
    The height of the baby at birth.
    static final String
    BIRTH_SEX
    The sex of the baby at birth.
    static final String
    BIRTH_WEEK
    The week of birth during pregnancy.
    static final String
    BIRTH_WEIGHT
    The weight of the baby at birth.
    static final double
    DEFAULT_HEIGHT
    Default birth height.
    static final double
    DEFAULT_WEIGHT
    Default birth weight.

  • Constructor Details

    • BirthStatistics

      public BirthStatistics()

  • Method Details

    • clearBirthStatistics

      public static void clearBirthStatistics(Person mother)
      Clear birth statistics of mothers newborn. Call this method after the mother gives birth.
      Parameters:
      mother - The baby's mother.

    • setBirthStatistics

      public static void setBirthStatistics(Person mother, long time)
      Sets attributes on the mother on when her baby will be born, the baby sex, and the birth height and weight. These attributes will be overridden on subsequent pregnancies.
      Parameters:
      mother - The baby's mother.
      time - The time.
